doc08.text: This project involves the refresh of the Integrated Information Display System (IIDS) for Changi Airport Group (CAG) Terminal 3. The objective is to enhance passenger information services through modern display technology and improved system reliability.

The project will follow an Incremental Agile methodology, ensuring phased delivery aligned with CAG's operational requirements. Key milestones include system design validation, integration testing, and UAT completion.

doc09.text: The governance structure includes a Steering Committee comprising CAG representatives and ATT executives. Weekly project status meetings and monthly Steering Committee reviews will ensure alignment with project goals.
The communication plan ensures regular updates to all stakeholders, with weekly reports to the client PM and monthly formal reports to the Steering Committee.

doc10.text: The project team includes experienced professionals with expertise in system design, development, and project management. Key personnel include the Project Manager, Technical Lead, and QA Lead.
